name: Google Search Console (GSC)
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Freelancers, Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Non Profit, Small Business
description:
What Google Search Console Does?

Google Search Console (GSC) is a free tool offered by Google that helps website owners monitor and maintain their site's presence in Google Search results. The keyword rank tracking features in GSC provide valuable insights and data to help improve search performance.

‍

Source: GetApp

‍

Features:

➡️ Detailed data on clicks, impressions, click-through rates (CTR), and average position for your site's pages.

➡️ Insights into the keywords that are driving traffic to your site, including their ranking positions.

➡️ Performance metrics for individual pages on your site, showing which pages rank for which queries.

➡️ Track keyword performance based on geographic location to understand how your site is performing in different regions.

➡️ Breakdown of keyword performance by device type (desktop, mobile, tablet), helping optimize for different user experiences.

➡️ Compare performance data over different time periods to identify trends and changes in keyword rankings.

➡️ Apply various filters (such as query, page, country, device) to focus on specific data sets and gain more detailed insights.

➡️ Sort data based on metrics like clicks, impressions, CTR, and average position for easier analysis.

Benefits:

⭐️ GSC is a free tool provided by Google, making it accessible to all website owners and SEO professionals without any cost.

⭐️ Easy-to-use interface with clear visualizations and reports, making it accessible for users of all experience levels.

⭐️ Offers a wide range of metrics and data points, providing a holistic view of your site's search performance.

⭐️ Helps identify opportunities for improvement in SEO strategy, including keyword optimization and content enhancement.

⭐️ Being a web-based tool, GSC does not require any installation or additional software, making it easy to set up and use.

⭐️ Easily integrates with other Google tools like Google Analytics, enhancing the overall data analysis and reporting capabilities.

Pros:

✅ It is extremely easy and accessible to use

Cons:

❌ Limited capabilities

‍

Free to use
